# Auto-generated from pyproject.toml for Koyeb/Heroku Python buildpack
# compatibility (these buildpacks require a requirements.txt in the repo
# root; they do not install directly from pyproject.toml).
#
# Includes the core runtime dependency plus the "mongo" and "telegram"
# optional-dependency groups from pyproject.toml, to run the mongo/kurigram
# adapters (DATABASE_PROVIDER=mongo, SEARCH_PROVIDER=mongo_text,
# TELEGRAM_PROVIDER=kurigram, STORAGE_PROVIDER=telegram) rather than the
# null/in-memory bootstrap defaults. Dev-only tools (ruff, mypy, pytest,
# import-linter, pre-commit) are intentionally excluded.
#
# Keep this file in sync with pyproject.toml's [project.dependencies] and
# [project.optional-dependencies] if those change.

# --- core ---

# --- mongo extra ---
motor>=3.5

# --- telegram extra ---
# NOTE: unpinned in pyproject.toml as well - the source comment there
# flags that no specific version has been verified yet. Pin an exact
# version here before relying on this in production, and confirm the
# installed package still exposes the `pyrogram` import name expected by
# src/media_platform/plugins/providers/telegram_kurigram/provider.py.
kurigram
